creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Browsing into asterisk ports, I've found odd things I'd like to clean up :
- net/asterisk-addons is not referenced ("connected") in net/Makefile
  (repocopied to net/asterisk14-addons around 2010/11/22)
- net/asterisk-addons is older than net/asterisk14-addons

Given that :
- net/asterisk-addons is not used as a dependency at all

I'd like to simply remove net/asterisk-addons from the ports tree.

Does it sound reasonable to you ?

(Note : I'll forward this PR to fjoe@, flo@ and pneumann@gmail.com who have been - or still are - involved in asterisk ports management)
